TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Lavulan ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 81 buwan, 222 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 219 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 96%, Tayan 0.5%, Rukay 0.5%, Puyuma 0.5%, Paywan 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lavulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Lavulan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lavulan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lavulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lavulan hya' ga Dakus. tay mkyahu' na Lavulan hya' ga Ua-asik. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ la*ulan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *.*%, rukaj *.*%, pujuma *.*%, pajwan *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa *akus~ɕ. taj mkjaħuʔ na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa ua-as~ɕik. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Lavulan ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 81 buwan, 222 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 219 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 96%, Tayan 0.5%, Rukay 0.5%, Puyuma 0.5%, Paywan 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lavulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Lavulan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lavulan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lavulan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lavulan hya' ga Dakus. tay mkyahu' na Lavulan hya' ga Ua-asik. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ la*ulan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *.*%, rukaj *.*%, pujuma *.*%, pajwan *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa *akus~ɕ. taj mkjaħuʔ na la*ulan ħjaʔ ɣa ua-as~ɕik. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
